front.title: A vellum scroll
front.description: A remarkably supple scroll, given its age, found in an ivory tube. It bears writing in a strange alphabet, penned in a dark red ink. There are diagrams, too. You think it might be some sort of recipe? Or spell? Maybe both?

content.text: To unlock the secrets of this scroll, you must…
… determine the scroll’s origin and be able to read the author’s language.
… break the cipher in which the recipe is encoded.
… acquire the recipe’s unusual and unsavory ingredients (Value 1).
… spend a few days practicing the incantation, risking a mistake on your first attempt, with potentially disastrous results.

back.title: Wishing Candles
